title: SimpleSpawn
body:
# Simplespawn

### Features:
- configureable countdown before Teleporting
- Turn on/off if /spawn should only work in overworld
- In Development: Cooldown before using Command again

### Commands:
- /spawn or /sp - teleports you to the Spawn after a configureable Time
- /setspawn - sets the new Point where Players get teleported to - requries the "setworldspawn"-Permission

### Feedback
This is the first Plugin I ever coded and if you have any Ideas or Feedback please hmu. on 
antonsl#2805 :)
